transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete consumption scenarios, statistics, and personal history add texture, but relentless slogans, addiction analogies, promises, and repeated instructions make the chapter feel coercive and substantially overextended.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Specific examples and autobiographical material briefly enliven the argument, yet the same claims cycle through emphatic headings, rhetorical questions, assurances, and a redundant closing summary.

parsed.generic_mechanism: No comparative mechanism emerges because identical diction, structure, pacing, examples, repetition, and closing material produce the same crafted reading experience.
